description: HUGGIES PURE & SENSITIVE NAPPIES SIZE 3: 68 PACK
long_description:
Experience gentle protection with every change with Huggies Pure and Sensitive premium nappies.

Our most gentle care, designed for sensitive skin. With simplified ingredients, consciously crafted with no lotions, no added fragrance, less additives and inks, and dermatologically tested.

Featuring Airsoft(R) Technology for ultimate softness and comfort for delicate skin and up to 12 hours protection for overnight leaks.

Plus, handy features for parents too - like a wetness indicator that changes colour when it's time for a change and our Size Up indicator to show when it's time to move up to the next size.

A soft hug, wrapped in modern Disney designs - Huggies Pure and Sensitive Nappies - it's like skincare for the other cheeks, baby.

* No added formaldehyde, elemental chlorine, natural rubber latex or other chemicals restricted by Kimberly-Clark
  • Huggies most gentle protection, designed for sensitive skin.

  • Simplified Ingredients with no lotions, no added fragrance, less additives, and less inks.

  • Up to 12 hours protection for overnight leaks.

  • Handy 'Wetness' and 'Size Up' indictors to help parents navigate change time..

long_description:
Rascals Premium Nappies are ultra-absorbent with up to 12 hours of leak protection and dermatologically tested gentle on skin.


Engineered with 6 Core Innovations for a high-performing nappy that's ready for every mess.


1. Unique Hydrolock Core
Our Hydrolock Core absorbs liquid with 4 layers of protection to help keep leaks contained.
2. Stretchy High-Back Waistband
The Rascals Stretchy High-Back Waistband is made with up to 12 pieces of elastic to hug around your baby's back comfortably.
3. AirSpun Softness

4. Advanced Leak Protection

Absorbs and traps liquid in seconds, to keep skin dry and help prevent rashes.

Hypoallergenic and dermatologically tested, our nappy materials are gentle on delicate skin.

description: HUGGIES SKIN PROTECT NEWBORN NAPPIES SIZE 1 108 PACK
long_description:
Start your baby's journey with our most advanced skin protection - Huggies Skin Protect(TM) Newborn Nappies.

With a clinically proven liner* enriched with Zinc Oxide (commonly found in nappy rash cream), to help protect against irritation, with visibly less redness on skin.

With our Drytouch(R) layer and wide pocket waistband to absorb and lock away runny poo, and Breathe Dry(R) technology that allows air to circulate around baby's skin.

Plus, handy features for parents too - like a wetness indicator that changes colour when it's time for a change and our Size Up indicator to show when it's time to move up to the next size.

Wrapped up in super cute Disney designs - Huggies Skin Protect(TM) Newborn Nappies - it's like skincare for the other cheeks, baby.

* This claim is based of a clinical study conducted at an independent laboratory, using adult skin as a suitable substitute for baby skin. Results showed significantly less irritation when using Huggies(R) Zinc Enriched layer vs control

***Packaging May Vary***

  • Huggies most advanced skin protection for delicate newborn skin

  • Clinically proven liner* enriched with Zinc Oxide (commonly found in nappy rash cream) to help protect against skin irritation.

  • Drytouch(R) layer and wide pocket waistband to absorb and lock away runny poo.

  • Breathe Dry(R) technology that allows air to circulate around baby's skin

  • Handy 'Wetness' and 'Size Up' indicators to help parents navigate change time

  • Super cute Disney Designs.

  • Endorsed by the Australian College of Midwives.

  • Available in unisex Nappies Sizes 1-3.
name: Skin Protect Newborn Nappies Size 1

description: HUGGIES CONVENIENCE NAPPIES SIZE 2 24 PACK
long_description:
Start your baby's journey with our most advanced skin protection - Huggies Skin Protect(TM) Newborn Nappies.

With a clinically proven liner* enriched with Zinc Oxide (commonly found in nappy rash cream), to help protect against irritation, with visibly less redness on skin.

With our Drytouch(R) layer and wide pocket waistband to absorb and lock away runny poo, and Breathe Dry(R) technology that allows air to circulate around baby's skin.

Plus, handy features for parents too - like a wetness indicator that changes colour when it's time for a change and our Size Up indicator to show when it's time to move up to the next size.

Wrapped up in super cute Disney designs - Huggies Skin Protect(TM) Newborn Nappies - it's like skincare for the other cheeks, baby.

* This claim is based of a clinical study conducted at an independent laboratory, using adult skin as a suitable substitute for baby skin. Results showed significantly less irritation when using Huggies(R) Zinc Enriched layer vs control

***Packaging May Vary***

  • Breathe Dry(R) technology that allows air to circulate around baby's skin

  • Handy 'Wetness' and 'Size Up' indicators to help parents navigate change time

long_description:
Rascals Premium Nappies are ultra-absorbent with up to 12 hours of leak protection and dermatologically tested gentle on skin.


Engineered with 6 Core Innovations for a high-performing nappy that's ready for every mess.


1. Unique Hydrolock Core
Our Hydrolock Core absorbs liquid with 4 layers of protection to help keep leaks contained.
2. Stretchy High-Back Waistband
The Rascals Stretchy High-Back Waistband is made with up to 12 pieces of elastic to hug around your baby's back comfortably.
3. AirSpun Softness
Using AirSpun Technology our nappy materials are hot-air bonded for a breathable, feather-soft feel that is gentle on skin.
4. Advanced Leak Protection
Our unique deep pocket and triple leak guards offer advanced protection from leaks and blowouts.
5. Fast-Dry Layer
Absorbs and traps liquid in seconds, to keep skin dry and help prevent rashes.
6. Zero Nasties [1]
Hypoallergenic and dermatologically tested, our nappy materials are gentle on delicate skin.


Don't just take our word for it, Rascals products are loved by millions of parents around the world with 210,000+ 5-Star Reviews Globally! [2]


Try Rascals Premium Nappies! Ready for every mess.

description: HUGGIES JUMBO NAPPY PANTS SIZE 4 GIRL JUMBO 62 PACK
long_description:
Enjoy Huggies Ultra Dry Nappy Pants with Rapid Dry Technology and better than ever coverage to keep bub snug and dry.

With tailored absorbency that absorbs wetness in under 10 seconds, where girls need it most.

Plus, a soft 360° Waistband for a comfortable and secure fit, with less bulk for babies on the move.

And the convenience of an easy on, easy off design, that pull on like pants and tear off with easy-tear sides. Wrapped in fun Disney designs.

Experience the benefit of a comfortable, struggle free change, with Huggies Ultra Dry HugFit Nappy Pants - it's like skincare for the other cheeks, baby.
  • Rapid Dry Technology - instantly absorbs wetness in 10 seconds - where girls need it most.

  • Better than ever coverage to keep bub snug and dry.

  • Soft 360 Waistband - for a comfortable and secure fit.

  • Less Bulky - and more flexible for babies on the move.

description: HUGGIES SKIN PROTECT NAPPIES SIZE 3: 74 PACK
long_description:
Start your baby's journey with our most advanced skin protection - Huggies Skin Protect(TM) Newborn Nappies.

With a clinically proven liner* enriched with Zinc Oxide (commonly found in nappy rash cream), to help protect against irritation, with visibly less redness on skin.

With our Drytouch(R) layer and wide pocket waistband to absorb and lock away wetness, and Breathe Dry(R) technology that allows air to circulate around baby's skin.

Plus, handy features for parents too - like a wetness indicator that changes colour when it's time for a change and our Size Up indicator to show when it's time to move up to the next size.

Wrapped up in super cute Disney designs - Huggies Skin Protect(TM) Nappies - it's like skincare for the other cheeks, baby.

* This claim is based of a clinical study conducted at an independent laboratory, using adult skin as a suitable substitute for baby skin. Results showed significantly less irritation when using Huggies(R) Zinc Enriched layer vs control
  • Huggies most advanced skin protection for delicate baby skin

  • Clinically proven liner* enriched with Zinc Oxide (commonly found in nappy rash cream) to help protect against skin irritation.

long_description:
Start your baby's journey with our most advanced skin protection - Huggies Skin Protect(TM) Nappy Pants.  

With a clinically proven liner* enriched with Zinc Oxide (commonly found in nappy rash cream), to help protect against irritation, with visibly less redness on skin.

With our Drytouch(R) layer to absorb wetness and spring back dry, and Breathe Dry(R) technology that allows air to circulate around baby's skin.

Plus, a cloudsoft and stretchy waistband that ensures a comfortable and secure fit. And the convenience of an easy on, easy off design, that pull on like pants and tear off with easy-tear sides.

Wrapped up in super cute Disney designs - Huggies Skin Protect(TM) Nappy Pants - it's like skincare for the other cheeks, baby.

* This claim is based of a clinical study conducted at an independent laboratory, using adult skin as a suitable substitute for baby skin. Results showed significantly less irritation when using Huggies(R) Zinc Enriched layer vs control

long_description:
Rascals Premium Nappy Pants help make change time easier. Our nappy pants are made with an Ultra Flex Waistband for our most comfortable fit. Our Easy On & Off Design make our nappy pants perfect for potty training.

Engineered with 6 Core Innovations for a high-performing pant, that means fewer blowouts, less mess and less stress for you.

1. UltraFlex 360 Waistband
With 15+ pieces of elastic our UltraFlex 360 Waistband offers our most comfortable fit for active babies.
2. Quick-Change Features
Made with easy-tear sides and a disposal tab for our quickest, easiest change!
3. Easy On & Off Design
With our Easy On & Off Design, our nappy pants function just like underwear to help with the transition to potty training.
4. AirSpun Softness

5. Unique Hydrolock Core
Our Hydrolock Core holds 25x its weight for 12 hours of advanced leak protection [1,2].
6. Zero Nasties
Clinically proven safe on sensitive skin, our pants materials are free from 100+ harmful substances.

Don't just take our word for it, Rascals products are loved by millions of parents around the world with 210,000+ 5-star reviews! [3]

long_description:
Huggies Little Sleepers(TM) Nappy Pants are crafted to help your baby enjoy a peaceful and dry night.

Featuring the 3-in-1 SleepDry(TM) Technology, these nappy pants are designed for extra protection to help keep your baby dry and leak-free in any sleeping position. They provide advanced overnight protection with an ultra-absorbent layer for superior overnight dryness.

The soft and secure leg cuffs are designed to create a comfortable seal to help contain mess, while the Cloudsoft 360° waistband helps trap mess in any sleeping position. With up to 12 hours of overnight leakage protection, these nappy pants help your baby stay comfortable all night long.

The Easy On - Easy Off design allows for quick and convenient changes, with easy-tear sides and disposal tape for added convenience.

Plus, they come with cute Disney designs that your baby will love!

  • Cloudsoft 360 waistband designed to help trap mess in any sleeping position

  • Super cute Disney Design your baby will love!.

description: RASCALS PREMIUM NAPPY PANTS SIZE 5 (13-18KG) 26 PACK
long_description:
Rascals Premium Nappy Pants help make change time easier. Our nappy pants are made with an Ultra Flex Waistband for our most comfortable fit. Our Easy On & Off Design make our nappy pants perfect for potty training.

Engineered with 6 Core Innovations for a high-performing pant, that means fewer blowouts, less mess and less stress for you.

1. UltraFlex 360 Waistband
With 15+ pieces of elastic our UltraFlex 360 Waistband offers our most comfortable fit for active babies.
2. Quick-Change Features
Made with easy-tear sides and a disposal tab for our quickest, easiest change!
3. Easy On & Off Design
With our Easy On & Off Design, our nappy pants function just like underwear to help with the transition to potty training.
4. AirSpun Softness
Using AirSpun Technology our pants materials are hot-air bonded for a breathable, feather-soft feel that is gentle on skin.
5. Unique Hydrolock Core
Our Hydrolock Core holds 25x its weight for 12 hours of advanced leak protection [1,2].
6. Zero Nasties
Clinically proven safe on sensitive skin, our pants materials are free from 100+ harmful substances.

Don't just take our word for it, Rascals products are loved by millions of parents around the world with 210,000+ 5-star reviews! [3]

Try Rascals Premium Nappy Pants! Our #1 fit for active babies [4].
Available from size 4-7.

-

  • Easy-Tear Sides

  • Fast-Dry Layer

  • Deep Pocket

  • Disposal Tab

description: RASCALS PREMIUM SWIM PANTS SMALL (6-11KG) 16 PACK
long_description:
Splash into summer with NEW Rascals Swim Pants! Rascals Swim Pants don't swell in water like regular nappies, designed for a comfortable fit when your little one is wet or dry. 

1. No Swell Core
Rascals Swim Pants don't swell in water like regular nappies. They are designed for a comfortable fit when your little one is wet or dry, perfect for summer trips to the pool or beach!
2. Triple Leak Guards
Made with Triple Leak Guards to keep messes contained, the main function of our Rascals Premium Swim Pants is to keep solids contained while your little one plays in and out of the water.
3. Easy Tear Sides
Our Easy-Tear Sides make for easy removal. Simply tear the sides of the pant to remove, and roll up for easy disposal.
4. Extra Stretchy Waistband
Rascals Swim Pants are designed like nappy pants, with an Extra-Stretchy Waistband so your little one can step into the pant and simply pull it up to wear.
5. Soft and Comfy Fit
Made to be soft and comfortable when your little one is wet or dry.
6. Fun CoComelon print!
Featuring JJ & friends in our fun CoComelon print, your little one is going to love playtime all summer long!

Try Rascals Premium Swim Pants today!
Available in sizes S, M and L.
  • No Swell Core

  • Triple Leak Guards

  • Easy Tear Sides

  • Extra Stretchy Waistband

  • Soft and Comfy Fit

  • Fun CoComelon print!.

description: TOOSHIES ECO NAPPIES SIZE 3 CRAWLER 6-11KG 44PK
long_description:
tooshies nappies, with a core made from 74% organic bamboo are the most sustainable choice when performance, comfort and caring for your baby are non-negotiables. Softer and more absorbent, the materials make this nappy super soft, breathable and hypoallergenic to soothe sensitive tooshies. With the environment in mind, these nappies have a plant-based backsheet and a biodegradable core.

Featuring our wonderful whale design, your little one will be having a whale of a time in our size 3 unisex crawler nappies. These nappies are designed with ultra-soft and flexible materials to move and groove with your growing baby. Naturally insulating, anti-microbial these nappies offer 12-hour leak-proof protection to keep your baby dry all day and night.

- Biodegradable bamboo core
- 100% Plant-based backsheet
- 12-hour leak proof protection
- Soft & breathable, flexible fit
- Naturally insulating and antimicrobial
- 0% fragrances, lotions, phthalates and parabens
- Hypoallergenic, vegan
- Available in five sizes from Newborn through to Walker (18kg)

Designed in Melbourne by a team of mums, every pack purchase supports Australian women experiencing crisis pregnancy through impact partner, The Babes Project.

description: CURASH  FRAGRANCE FREE SENSTIVE SKIN BABY WIPES 80 PACK
ingredients: Aqua (Water), Sodium Benzoate, Cocamidopropyl PG-Dimonium Chloride Phosphate, Citric Acid, Sodium Citrate, Glycerin, Aloe Barbadensis (Aloe Vera) Leaf Juice, Potassium Sorbate
long_description:
New Formula Curash Sensitive Fragrance Free Baby Wipes are specially formulated with 99% of the ingredients from natural origin. They are free from perfumes, soap, alcohol and preservatives such as parabens, MI or phenoxyethanol. Dermatologist and Paediatrician tested, they are pH balanced and suitable for sensitive skin. Curash Sensitive Fragrance Free Baby Wipes are soft and gentle for baby, but also thick and strong for you, so you can tackle whatever mess life throws at you.
They are vegan friendly, not tested on animals and also suitable to clean little hands and faces.
Our new packaging is made from fully recyclable polypropylene (PP) and the Easy Seal lid contains 30% recycled plastic.
The Curash brand was originally developed by a doctor in Sydney, Australia, and has been caring for baby's skin for over 35 years.

Curash is proud to partner with Tresillian and the Tresillian Parent's Help Line, to help reach more Aussie parents and support them on their parenting journey.

  • NEW LOOK NEW FORMULA AVAILABLE NOW: Curash Fragrance Free Baby Wipes are transitioning to a great NEW Formula and gorgeous NEW Look packaging, with improved sustainability. The country of origin may vary.

  • Suitable for Sensitive Skin

  • 99% Ingredients from Natural Origin

  • Dermatologist & Paediatrician Tested

  • Suitable for Newborns

  • Free From Fragrance, Parabens, Alcohol, Soap, MI, Phenoxyethanol; Yuka Score 100/100.

  • pH Balanced.

  • Thick, Soft and Strong and Suitable for Cleaning Hands and Faces.
name: Fragrance Free Senstive Skin Baby Wipes

description: TOOSHIES WATER BABY WIPES 70PACK
ingredients: Aqua, Sodium Benzoate, (Gentle preservative) Hydroxyacetophenone, (Gentle antioxidant), Decyl Glucoside, (Gentle plant-based cleanser) Polyaminopropyl Biguanide Gentle preservative)
long_description:
Our unscented pure water wipe is a pared back option of our best selling aloe vera and chamomile baby wipe. With only a handful of ingredients, we've created a water-based baby wipe that can be used on even the most sensitive newborn skin.

These pure baby wipes are infused with 99.4% medical-grade water with a few additional clean, gentle ingredients that keep the wipe safe and clean for your little one.

Unlike some of the water wipes available in Australia and around the world, our water wipes are 100% plastic-free and will compost back into the earth in as little as 60 days.

This convenient single pack of 70 wipes comes with a ‘one hand' open lid and is a great inclusion in your hospital bag, for use out and about or on-the-go in your car or pram. Try these if you are looking for baby wipes that won't irritate your little one's soft, sensitive skin.
  • 99.4% pure water

  • 100% plastic free

  • Biodegradable and compostable

  • Unique textured plant based cloth for a pure clean from head to toe

  • Fragrance free

  • Hypoallergenic, vegan, not tested on animals.

  • Large one-hand open lid.
name: Water Baby Wipes

description: TOOSHIES ECO WIPES ALOE VERA & CHAMOMILE 70PK
ingredients: Aqua glycerin (plant based moisturiser), silver citrate (gentle preservative), sodium citrate (plant based antioxidant), citric acid (plant based stabiliser), glyceryl caprylate (naturally derived), aloe barbadensis leaf juice powder (organic), chamomilla recutita flower extract (organic), pelargonium graveolens flower oil (rose geranium oil)
long_description:
Babies' skin is ten times thinner than adults, and as such is sensitive and prone to irritation, which is why tooshies choose to leave out the nasties. The ingredients in our wipes are 99.9% natural, the wipe cloth itself is made from 100% plant-based fibres and is biodegradable.

The organic aloe vera in our wet wipes provide a cooling quality to your baby's skin. Aloe vera is known for its anti-inflammatory and nappy rash fighting properties. Combined with the soothing and calming qualities of chamomile, you get a nourishing, fresh and non-irritating baby wipe, helpful for every one of life's messes.

This convenient single pack of 70 wipes comes with a ‘one hand' open lid and is great for use at home or when you're on-the-go in your car or pram.
  • 100% plastic free

  • Biodegradable and compostable

  • 0% alcohol, phenols, phthalates, parabens

  • Unique textured plant based cloth for a pure clean from head to toe

  • Made with nourishing organic ingredients: organic Aloe Vera and Chamomile

  • Hypoallergenic, vegan, not tested on animals.

  • Infused with Rose Germanium.

  • Large one-hand open lid.
name: Eco Wipes Aloe Vera & Chamomile

description: HUGGIES WATER WIPES 72PK
long_description:
When it comes to caring for your skin baby, all you need is your parent's loving touch and a bit of help from Huggies Thick Baby Wipes. Created with natural fibres* and the ultimate combination of thickness, softness and absorbency for a 3 in 1 complete clean.

Your skin is so delicate, which is why Huggies PURE 99% Purified Water Baby Wipes is perfect for you. With 99% purified water, a splash of baby friendly essentials and no added preservatives. It is dermatologically tested for delicate skin.


*Wipes made with 70% wood pulp fibres.
  • 99% Purified Water

  • Dermatologically tested for delicate skin

  • No added preservatives

  • Designed with natural fibres**70% wood pulp fibres

  • No Added Nasties^ ^ No parabens, soap, MI, alcohol (means ethanol and isopropanol), phenoxyethanol or other chemicals restricted by Kimberly-Clark - see http://www.huggies.com.au/noaddednasties.

  • Endorsed by the Australian College of Midwives.
name: Thick Baby Wipes 99% Purified Water

description: CURASH SIMPLY WATER SENSITIVE SKIN BABY WIPES 80PK
ingredients: Aqua (Water), Sodium Benzoate, Hydroxyacetophenone, Citric Acid, Coco-Glucoside, Aloe Barbadensis (Aloe Vera) Leaf Juice, Potassium Sorbate
long_description:
NEW Formula Curash Simply Water Baby Wipes contain 99% purified water and are specially formulated with 0% soap, alcohol, MI or parabens. They are Dermatologist and Paediatrician tested to be suitable for even newborns' delicate skin. Curash Simply Water Baby Wipes are thick, soft and strong to make cleanups easy at nappy change time. They are vegan friendly, not tested on animals and also suitable to clean little hands and faces. Our new packaging is fully recyclable and the Easy Seal lid contains 30% recycled plastic.
The Curash brand was originally developed by a doctor in Sydney, Australia, and has been caring for baby's skin for over 35 years.

Curash is proud to partner with Tresillian and the Tresillian Parent's Help Line, to help reach more Aussie parents and support them on their parenting journey.

  • NEW LOOK NEW FORMULA AVAILABLE NOW: Curash Simply Water Baby Wipes are transitioning to a great NEW Formula and gorgeous NEW Look packaging, with improved sustainability. The country of origin may vary.

  • Suitable for Newborns

  • Dermatologist & Paediatrician Tested

  • 0% Soap, Alcohol, Parabens, MI or Phenoxyethanol; Yuka Score 100/100

  • Thick, Soft & Strong.

  • Vegan Friendly and Not Tested on Animals.

  • Fully Recyclable Packaging with Easy Seal Lid made with 30% Recycled Plastic.

description: WATERWIPES BABY & NEWBORN SENSITIVE WIPES 180 PACK
ingredients: Water (Aqua) 99.9%, Citrus Grandis (grapefruit) seed extract*. *Contains trace of Benzalkonium Chloride
long_description:
WaterWipes™ Baby & Newborn Sensitive Wipes are the world's purest wipes for sensitive skin*. Designed to gently clean, care and help protect sensitive skin - now with a 2X stronger† wipe that's thicker and softer with a fresh new look.


  • PACKAGING MAY VARY: As we refine our wipes and uphold our commitment to purity, you may receive a different package, but inside the gentle, water-based wipes are crafted with the same formula and care you know, trust, and love.

  • FOR EVERYDAY NAPPY CHANGES: Crafted to gently clean and help protect premature, infant and newborn skin.

  • PURE & GENTLE INGREDIENTS: WaterWipes™ Sensitive Newborn & Baby Wipes are formulated with just two ingredients - 99.9% purified water and a drop of fruit extract - they gently cleanse and help protect sensitive skin.

  • 2X STRONGER†: Upgraded for more versatility, WaterWipes™ are now thicker, softer & 2X stronger† to tackle tougher messes while keeping the same, trusted purity.

  • EVERYDAY USE ON SENSITIVE SKIN: When life plays dirty, WaterWipes™ plays it clean. Ideal for cleaning small messes and refreshing skin on-the-go, these disposable wipes make the perfect daily essential.

  • 3-IN-1 SKIN CARE BENEFITS: Made using minimal ingredients, our wipes have a neutral pH range, which helps protect the natural skin barrier.

  • PURE & GENTLE FORMULA: WaterWipes™ unique 7 stage water purification, requires minimum ingredients, with 0% fragrance and alcohol^.

  • DERMATOLOGICALLY & PAEDIATRICIAN APPROVED: Gentle enough for eczema-prone and sensitive skin, WaterWipes™ are approved by dermatologists and paediatricians through the Skin Health Alliance, accepted by the Eczema Association Australasia, and registered with The Vegan Society.

  • PLANT BASED WIPES**: Made from plant-based materials, these wipes are gentle on skin and the planet.

*Visit waterwipes.com/claims-verification for claims comparison verification


†material than previous WaterWipes™


**Wipe made from regenerated cellulose (viscose) utilizing wood pulp as a precursor. For more information see our website.


^No ethanol.
name: Baby & Newborn Sensitive Wipes

long_description:
Aptamil understands not all babies are the same. Every family and every feeding journey is unique. 

That's why we developed Aptamil Gold+ 2, our premium follow-on formula, containing our scientifically researched ingredients backed by over 50 years of advanced breast milk research. 

Suitable for formula-fed infants from 6 months, our trusted scientific formulation is designed to support the nutritional needs of your growing baby. 

- Contains scientifically researched ingredients 
- Supports nutritional needs of babies from 6 months 
- Nutritional support when introducing solids 
- Suitable for mixed feeding 

Available in packs of 4 single-use sachets.

Not suitable for infants with cow's milk protein allergies, lactose intolerance and galactosaemia.
name: Gold+ 2 Baby Follow - On Formula From 6-12 Months

long_description:
Aptamil understands not all children are the same. Every family and every feeding journey is unique. 

Backed by 50 years of early life nutrition research Aptamil Gold+ 4, our premium junior nutritional supplement is suitable for children from 2 years.  
 
Our scientifically tailored formulation contains a unique prebiotic and probiotic blend, vitamins B6 and B12 for normal immune system function, iron and iodine for normal cognitive function, calcium and Vitamin D for normal teeth and bone structure and 16 essential vitamins and minerals for trusted immune system support*. 

- Immune system function support with 8 immunity nutrients: zinc, iron, folate, and vitamins A, B6, B12, C and D* 
- Cognitive function: contains iron & iodine for normal cognitive function* 
- Enriched with our unique prebiotic & probiotic blend 
- Digestive function: contains calcium which contributes to digestive enzyme function* 
- Supports normal growth & development with 16 essential vitamins and minerals* 
- No sucrose or artificial colours 
- With the goodness of cow's milk 

Suitable for toddlers from 2 years whose nutritional intake may be inadequate.  

Not suitable for toddlers with cow's milk protein allergies, lactose intolerance and galactosaemia. 

*When prepared as directed and consumed as part of a healthy varied diet.

long_description:
Aptamil understands not all babies are the same. Every family and every feeding journey is unique. 

That's why we created Aptamil Gold+ 1, a nutritionally complete premium infant formula backed by over 50 years of advanced breast milk research.  

Suitable for infants from birth to 6 months, our trusted scientific formulation is designed to meet the nutritional needs of your growing baby. 

- Contains scientifically researched ingredients 
- Nutritionally complete from birth to 6 months 
- Available in packs of 5 single-use sachets 

Not suitable for infants with cow's milk protein allergies, lactose intolerance and galactosaemia.
name: Gold+ 1 Baby Infant Formula From 0-6 Months

Our infant formula stage 1 is designed to be nutritionally complete for healthy infants from birth, providing quality, balanced nourishment for your little one. *Infants over 6 months of age will need additional nourishment. long_description:
At Sanulac Nutritionals Australia, we believe nutrition, science and care are important for early life. The Alula Toddler & Junior range of quality products provides age-appropriate nutrition for children, combining both scientifically researched ingredients and care for your child.

Alula Gold Toddler Premium Milk Drink
Our premium toddler formulation, carefully formulated as a supplementary milk drink for toddlers. It is a good source of 16 key vitamins and minerals plus it contains Omega 3 DHA and lutein.

- Immune support from 8 nutrients (As part of a varied and healthy diet and prepared as directed. When intakes of energy and nutrients may not be adequate. See above for details)
- 16 nutrients for toddlers' growth & development (As part of a varied and healthy diet and prepared as directed. When intakes of energy and nutrients may not be adequate. See above for details)
- Plant-based Omega 3 DHA & Lutein

Our premium toddler milk drink
One 220mL serve contains many essential nutrients to help support:

Immune Support
Vitamins (A, B6, B12, C, D), Folate, Iron & Zinc for immune system function.

Growth & Development
Vitamins (A, B1, B2, B6, B12, C, D, E), Niacin, Folate, Calcium, Phosphorus, Magnesium, Iron, Zinc
& Iodine for toddlers' growth & development.

Cognitive Function
Iodine & Zinc to aid cognitive function, and Iron to help support toddlers' cognitive development.

Eye Care & Support
Rich in Vitamin A, B2 & Zinc to support normal vision.
name: Gold Toddler 1 Year+ Milk Drink

long_description:
Choose trusted nutrition from the world #1 in growing-up formula*. Nestle NAN SUPREMEpro 3 is a scientifically advanced toddler milk drink, formulated to cater to the unique nutritional needs of young children when energy and nutrient intakes may not be adequate. As a toddler drink, it is designed to supplement the diet of your toddler and includes nutrients such as iron and Vitamin D to support their growth and development^. Backed by over 155 years of Nestle expertise in child nutrition, NAN SUPREMEpro 3 toddler milk drink offers a high-quality, scientifically advanced formulation. Nestle NAN SUPREMEpro 3 toddler drink is enriched with 16 vitamins and minerals and contains Probiotic Bifidus BL. This probiotic is similar to those found in the digestive system of breastfed babies . In addition, the toddler milk drink is rich in vitamins B6, B12, and C, which support normal energy metabolism to help unlock energy for your active toddler^. For hygiene and convenience, this toddler drink is available in an innovative packaging format with a separate storage area for the scoop, and a semi-transparent window which allows you to see how much toddler milk drink powder is left in the can without having to open it. ^Enjoy Nestle NAN SUPREMEpro 3 as a supplement to a varied diet when energy and nutrient intakes may not be adequate. From 1 year of age. *From 1 to 5 yrs. Globally, Nestle is the top manufacturer of GUM (Value sales year to 03/2025): TELUS TABS Analytics Worldview.
  • Toddler milk drink with probiotic Bifidus BL. A probiotic similar to those found in the digestive system of breastfed babies.

  • Toddler milk drink, rich in vitamins C & D, supports your toddler's growth and development*.

  • A toddler drink that contains iron & zinc to support your toddler's cognitive function*.

  • This toddler drink contains vitamins B6, B12 & C to support your toddler's energy metabolism*.

  • Contains 100% partially hydrolysed whey protein to help make this milk drink easy to digest for your toddler*.
name: Nan Supremepro 3 Toddler Milk Drink From 1 Year

description: KARICARE TODDLER 3 GUM FORMULA
ingredients: Milk Solids, Maltodextrin, Short Chain Galacto-Oligosaccharides (Milk), Vegetable Oils (Emulsifier (Soy Lecithin), Antioxidant (Ascorbyl Palmitate)), Dried Omega LCPUFAs (Fish Oil Contains Milk, Antioxidant (Sodium Ascorbate, Mixed Tocopherols, Ascorbyl Palmitate, Dl-Alpha Tocopherol), Whey Protein (Milk), Emulsifier (Soy Lecithin)), Long Chain Fructo-Oligosaccharides, Emulsifier (Soy Lecithin). long_description:
Karicare Toddler Milk Drink Stage 3 is crafted with the natural goodness of real New Zealand milk, sourced from local farms with no added preservatives or artificial flavours.
  • Contains unique blend of prebiotics plus omega-3 DHA from natural sources
  • Provides the essential vitamins and minerals that help contribute to normal growth and development in toddlers*.
  • Calcium and Vitamin D for normal teeth and bone structure, as well as Iron for normal immune system function*.
Enjoy peace of mind knowing that your growing toddler is getting quality nutrition.

*Specially designed to supplement the normal dietary needs of toddlers, when their intake of energy and nutrients may not be adequate.

description: ALULA ADVANCE+ NEWBORN STAGE 1 FORMULA 800G
ingredients: Milk solids, vegetable oils (including esterified and soybean), plant-based long-chain polyunsaturated fatty acids (arachidonic acid [AA], docosahexaenoic acid [DHA] contain milk), prebiotic oligosaccharides (2'-fucosyllactose [2'-FL], lacto-N-neotetraose [LNnT]), emulsifier (soy lecithin), L-cysteine, L-leucine, choline, L-phenylalanine, L-histidine, L-valine, taurine, inositol, nucleotides (cytidine-5'-monophosphate, disodium uridine-5'-monophosphate, adenosine-5'-monophosphate, disodium inosine-5'-monophosphate, disodium guanosine-5'-monophosphate), antioxidants (mixed tocopherols concentrate, ascorbyl palmitate), L-carnitine, lutein. Minerals: Potassium, chloride, calcium, phosphorus, sodium, magnesium, iron, zinc, copper, iodine, manganese, selenium. Vitamins: Vitamin C, vitamin E, niacin, pantothenic acid, vitamin B1, vitamin A, vitamin B2, vitamin B6, folic acid, vitamin K1, biotin, vitamin D, vitamin B12. Contains milk and soy. The protein source of Alula Advance+ Newborn Infant Formula is cow's milk.
long_description:
At Sanulac Nutritionals Australia, we believe nutrition, science and care are important for early life. The Alula range provides age-appropriate nutrition for children with high quality products, combining both scientifically researched ingredients and care for your child.

Alula Advance+ Newborn Infant Formula
Lovingly crafted in NZ, our most advanced and premium formulation, for babies from birth, is created with scientifically researched ingredients, providing complete nutrition for your child.

  • Our most advanced, nutritionally complete infant formula.

  • Scientifically researched ingredients.

  • Made with New Zealand milk.

Ready to progress? Alula Advance+ Premium Follow-on Formula for 6-12 Months (Stage 2)

  • Our most advanced formulation

  • Nutritionally complete infant formula

  • Made in New Zealand

Biostime SN-2 BIO PLUS HPO Infant Formula is scientifically developed to provide complete nutrition for growing infants from birth to 6 months.

long_description:
At Sanulac Nutritionals Australia, we believe nutrition, science and care are important for early life. The Alula Toddler & Junior range of quality products provides age-appropriate nutrition for children, combining both scientifically researched ingredients and care for your child.

Alula Gold Junior Premium Milk Drink
Our premium junior formulation, designed as a supplementary milk drink for young children.
A good source of 16 key vitamins & minerals plus it contains prebiotic FOS, Omega 3 DHA and lutein.

- Immune support from 8 nutrients (As part of a varied and healthy diet and prepared as directed. When intakes of energy and nutrients may not be adequate. See above for details)
- 16 nutrients for childrens' growth & development (As part of a varied and healthy diet and prepared as directed. When intakes of energy and nutrients may not be adequate. See above for details)
- Plant-based Omega 3 DHA & Lutein

Our premium junior milk drink
One 225mL serve contains many essential nutrients to help support:

Immune Support
Vitamins (A, B6, B12, C, D), Folate, Iron & Zinc for immune system function.

Growth & Development
Vitamins (A, B1, B2, B6, B12, C, D, E), Niacin, Folate, Calcium, Phosphorus, Magnesium, Iron, Zinc & Iodine for childrens' growth & development.

Cognitive Function
Iodine & Zinc to aid cognitive function, & Iron to help support childrens' cognitive development.

Eye Care & Support
Rich in Vitamin A, B2 & Zinc to support normal vision.

description: NESTLE NAN OPTIPRO 3 TODDLER MILK DRINK STAGE 3 800G
ingredients: Milk solids, maltodextrin, vegetable oils, minerals (calcium citrate, calcium phosphate, sodium phosphate, magnesium chloride, ferrous sulphate, zinc sulphate, potassium iodide), emulsifier (soy lecithin), fish oil, vitamins [sodium ascorbate (vit C), dl-alpha-tocopheryl acetate (vit E), niacinamide (niacin), pyridoxine hydrochloride (vit B6), riboflavin (vit B2), thiamin mofalsenitrate (vit B1), retinyl acetate (vit A), folic acid, cholecalciferol (vit D3), cyafalsecobalamin (vit B12)], antioxidants (mixed tocopherols concentrate, ascorbyl palmitate), acidity regulator (citric acid), culture (Bifidobacterium lactis).
long_description:
Choose trusted nutrition from the world #1 in growing-up formula*. Nestle NAN OPTIPRO 3 is a toddler milk drink for toddlers from 1 year of age. This toddler milk drink is formulated to support your toddler's nutritional needs and includes age-optimised protein for your toddler's growth and development^. Nestle NAN OPTIPRO 3 toddler milk drink contains Probiotic Bifidus BL, a probiotic similar to those found in the digestive system of breastfed babies. It also contains 16 vitamins and minerals including iron, zinc, and vitamins B6, B12, C, and D, all of which contribute to normal immune system function. ^NAN OPTIPRO 3 toddler drink has been specially formulated for your toddler to enjoy supplementary to a varied diet when energy and nutrient intakes may not be adequate. For hygiene and convenience, our Nestle NAN OPTIPRO 3 toddler milk drink is available in an innovative packaging format with a separate storage area for the scoop, and a semi-transparent window that allows you to see how much toddler milk drink powder is left in the can without having to open it. We are pursuing initiatives to help care for the environment for the next generations: RENEWABLE ELECTRICITY - The factory where our Nestle NAN OPTIPRO 3 toddler milk drink is produced sources 100% renewable electricity; PLANT BASED RESOURCES - At least 66% of the plastic lid and scoop is produced from sugar cane. *From 1 to 5 yrs. Globally, Nestle is the top manufacturer of GUM (Value sales year to 03/2025): TELUS TABS Analytics Worldview.
  • Toddler milk drink with iron helping your child's immune system function*.

  • Toddler milk drink specifically designed with Vitamin C to aid in your toddler's growth and development*.

  • Just two servings per day of this toddler milk drink provides your child with an average of 50% or more of the recommended dietary intake of calcium, iron, zinc, iodine, and vitamins B1, B2, C, D & E.

  • Toddler milk drink with probiotic Bifidus BL, a probiotic similar to those found in the digestive system of breastfed babies.

  • Our Nestle NAN OPTIPRO 3 toddler milk drink comes in an innovative packaging format with a separate storage area for the scoop for your convenience.
name: Nan Optipro 3 Toddler Milk Drink Stage 3

description: BIOSTIME SN-2 BIO PLUS HPO TODDLER MILK DRINK 12+ MONTHS 800G
ingredients: Milk Solids (Skim Milk, Lactose, Whey Protein), Vegetable Oils (Rapeseed Oil, Coconut Oil, Sunflower Oil, Soybean Oil, Antioxidant [Ascorbyl Palmitate]), Galacto-oligosaccharides (GOS) (From Milk), Arachidonic Acid (ARA), Docosahexaenoic Acid (DHA) (From Fish), Fructo-oligosaccharides (FOS), Emulsifier (Soy Lecithin), Culture (Bifidobacterium infantis^). Minerals: Calcium, Iodine, Iron, Magnesium, Phosphorus, Zinc. Vitamins: Folic Acid, Niacin, Riboflavin, Thiamin, Vitamin A, Vitamin B6, Vitamin B12, Vitamin C, Vitamin D, Vitamin E.
long_description:
Biostime SN-2 BIO PLUS HPO Toddler Milk Drink is our premium Australian made formulation, containing an advanced blend of prebiotics, as well as a probiotic found naturally in the digestive tract of breast-fed infants.

It also contains Omega-3 DHA, along with 16 essential vitamins & minerals to support your toddler's immune system function, and healthy growth & development. It has a naturally smooth and creamy taste and contains no artificial colours or flavours.

Biostime SN-2 BIO PLUS HPO Toddler Milk Drink is palm oil free and formulated to Australia's highest quality standards using Australian cow's milk.

Supports your toddler's:
  • Digestive System
    With Calcium, contributing to the normal function of digestive enzymes.
  • Cognitive Function
    With Iron, which contributes to normal cognitive function.
  • Immune System Function
    With Vitamins B6, B12, C and Zinc to support normal immune system function.
  • Healthy & Strong Bones
    With Calcium & Vitamin D to help support bone structure.
  • Harnesses the Power of Oligosaccharides (HPO): Combining prebiotic oligosaccharides with probiotics for an advanced synbiotic blend^.

  • Hygiene and Convenience: Lid includes a handy & hygienic holder for scoop.

  • Palm Oil Free

  • Smooth & Creamy Taste

  • No artificial colours or flavours.

  • Made in Sydney, Australia: Using milk from Australian dairy farms in Gippsland..

We believe balanced nutrition is important for growth and development. Sanulac Nutritionals Australia is committed to bringing you the latest nutritional science for your child.

Alula Advance+ Toddler Premium Milk Drink

Lovingly crafted with NZ full cream milk and no added sugar, Alula Advance+ Toddler is our most advanced milk drink for children 1 year+. Formulated with prebiotic FOS for digestive well-being* and 8 key nutrients for immune support*.

  • Prebiotic FOS

  • Good source of 8 nutrients for immune system function*

  • Plant-based Omega 3 DHA & Lutein

  • No added sugar

*As part of a varied and healthy diet and prepared as directed. See details above.

  • Digestive support for happy tummies from Prebiotic FOS: The Prebiotic FOS in 2x serves per day of Alula Advance+ Toddler promotes growth of beneficial gut bacteria in healthy children.

  • Immune System Function: Vitamins (A, B6, B12, C, D), folate, iron, zinc for immune system function.

  • Cognitive Development: Iron to help support toddlers' cognitive development.

  • Growth and Development: Rich in Calcium & Vitamin D necessary for strong bones & teeth and children's growth and development.

  • *As part of a varied and healthy diet and prepared as directed. See details above.

description: APTAMIL GOLD+ 3 TODDLER NUTRITIONAL SUPPLEMENT FROM 1 YEAR 900G
ingredients: Milk solids, maltodextrin, vegetable oils (emulsifier (soy lecithin), antioxidant (ascorbyl palmitate)), short chain galacto-oligosaccharides (milk), dried omega LCPUFAs (fish oil contains milk, antioxidant (sodium ascorbate, mixed tocopherols, ascorbyl palmitate, dl-alpha tocopherol), whey protein (milk), emulsifier (soy lecithin)), long chain fructo-oligosaccharides, emulsifier (soy lecithin), Bifidobacterium breve M-16V. Minerals: Calcium, phosphorus, magnesium, iron, zinc, iodine. Vitamins: Vitamins (A, B1, B2, B3, B6, B12, C, D, E), folic acid.
long_description:
Aptamil understands not all children are the same. Every family and every feeding journey is unique. 
 
Backed by 50 years of early life nutrition research Aptamil Gold+ 3, our premium toddler nutritional supplement is suitable for children from 1 year old.  
 
Our scientifically tailored formulation provides trusted immune system support with 16 essential vitamins and minerals for normal growth and development in children^. 
 
- Enriched with our unique prebiotic & probiotic blend 
- Immune system function support with 8 immunity nutrients: zinc, iron, folate, and vitamins A, B6, B12, C and D* 
- Cognitive function: contains iron & iodine for normal cognitive function* 
- Digestive function: contains calcium which contributes to digestive enzyme function* 
- Supports normal growth & development with 16 essential vitamins and minerals* 
- No sucrose or artificial colours 
- With the goodness of cow's milk  

Available in packs of 4 single-use sachets.
 
Suitable for toddlers from 1 year whose nutritional intake may be inadequate.  

Not suitable for toddlers with cow's milk protein allergies, lactose intolerance and galactosaemia. 

*When prepared as directed and consumed as part of a healthy varied diet.

description: NESTLE NAN SUPREMEPRO STAGE 4 MILK DRINK 800G
ingredients: Lactose (milk), enzymatically hydrolysed whey (milk), vegetable oils, maltodextrin, minerals (calcium, phosphorus, magnesium, iron, zinc, iodine), emulsifier (soy lecithin), acidity regulator (citric acid), omega LCPUFA [Docosahexaenoic acid (DHA)], vitamins [sodium ascorbate (vit C), dl-alpha tocopherol acetate (vit E), niacinamide (niacin), pyridoxine hydrochloride (vit B6), riboflavin (vit B2), thiamin mononitrate (vit B1), retinyl acetate (vit A), folic acid, cholecalciferol (vit D3), cyanocobalamin (vit B12)], antioxidants (mixed tocopherols concentrate, ascorbyl palmitate), culture (Bifidobacterium lactis).
long_description:
Choose trusted nutrition from the world #1 in growing-up formula*. Nestle NAN SUPREMEpro 4 toddler milk drink is a specially formulated supplementary toddler food for young children from 2 years of age, made to support your toddler's nutritional needs when energy and nutrient intakes may not be adequate. Backed by over 155 years of Nestle expertise in child nutrition, NAN SUPREMEpro 4 toddler milk drink offers a high-quality, scientifically advanced formulation. Nestle NAN SUPREMEpro 4 toddler milk drink contains Probiotic Bifidus BL, a probiotic similar to those found in the digestive system of breastfed babies and 16 vitamins and minerals. This toddler milk drink contains iron, zinc, and vitamins B6, B12, C, and D, all of which contribute to normal immune system function. Vitamins such as B6, B12, and C, in this toddler drink support normal energy metabolism to help unlock energy for your active toddler. ^Enjoy Nestle NAN SUPREMEpro 4 toddler milk drink as a supplement to a varied diet when energy and nutrient intakes may not be adequate. From 2 years of age. For hygiene and convenience, NAN SUPREMEpro 4 toddler milk drink is available in an innovative packaging format with a separate storage area for the scoop, and a semi-transparent window which allows you to see how much milk powder is left in the can without having to open it. Nestle NAN SUPREMEpro 4 toddler milk drink is reduced in fat (5.4g per serve) compared to NAN SUPREMEpro 3 (7.4g per serve). The lid and scoop are made from at least 66% plant-based plastic. *From 1 to 5 yrs. Globally, Nestle is the top manufacturer of GUM (Value sales year to 03/2025): TELUS TABS Analytics Worldview.
  • Stage 4 toddler drink with probiotic Bifidus BL.

  • Toddler milk drink rich in vitamins B6, B12, C & D supporting normal immune system function*.

  • This toddler milk drink is rich in iron and zinc, supporting your toddler's cognitive function*.

  • Stage 4 toddler milk drink with vitamins B6, B12 & C to support energy metabolism*.

  • Toddler milk drink that contains 100% partially hydrolysed whey protein making it easy to digest*.

long_description:
At Sanulac Nutritionals Australia, we believe nutrition, science and care are important for early life. The Alula Toddler & Junior range of quality products provides age-appropriate nutrition for children, combining both scientifically researched ingredients and care for your child.

Alula Gentle Toddler Milk Drink

A nutritious milk drink for toddlers from 12 months. Carefully formulated as a supplementary milk drink, it's a good source of key vitamins and minerals for your growing toddler*

  • Omega-3 fatty acids

  • Zinc & Vitamin C for Immune support*

  • No added preservatives

  • Good source of iron

Simple goodness with key nutrients

One 220mL serve contains many essential nutrients to help support:

  • Growth & Development: With Iron & Iodine to help support toddlers' growth and development, plus calcium & vitamin D to help support bone structure.

  • Immune Support: With Zinc and vitamin C to help support immune system function.

  • Cognitive Function: With iodine and zinc to help support cognitive function.

  • Digestive Function: With Calcium, which contributes to the function of digestive enzymes. Digestive enzymes facilitate digestion.

*As part of a varied and healthy diet and prepared as directed. See details above.

When it's time to progress: 2+Years: Alula Gold Junior Milk Drink - Carefully formulated as a premium supplementary drink for young children.

  • Simple goodness with key nutrients

  • Iron and Iodine for toddlers' growth*

  • Calcium for strong bones & teeth*

  • Made in New Zealand

  • *As part of a varied and healthy diet and prepared as directed. See details above.

Aptamil Gold+ 3

Aptamil Gold+ 3 is a premium nutritional supplement suitable from 1 year old. 

The formulation contains our unique prebiotic and probiotic blend. This supplement is nutritionally tailored for toddlers, with Vitamin B6 & B12 for normal immune function (vitamins B6 & B12 for normal immune function ) and Iron & Iodine for normal cognitive function (when prepared as directed and consumed as part of a healthy varied diet). It contains 16 essential vitamins and minerals to support growth and development in children (when prepared as directed and consumed as part of a healthy varied diet).

- Iron & Iodine for normal cognitive function (when prepared as directed and consumed as part of a healthy varied diet)

description: APTAMIL GOLD+ REFLUX FORMULA 900G
ingredients: Milk solids, vegetable oils (emulsifier (soy lecithin), antioxidant (ascorbyl palmitate)), thickener (carob bean gum), short chain galacto-oligosaccharides (milk), dried omega LCPUFAs (fish oil, sodium caseinate (milk), antioxidant (sodium ascorbate, natural tocopherols (soy), ascorbyl palmitate, dl-alpha-tocopherol), whey protein (milk), emulsifier (soy lecithin)), long chain fructo-oligosaccharides, taurine, choline chloride, inositol, L-carnitine. Minerals: Potassium, calcium, chloride, phosphorus, sodium, magnesium, iron, zinc, copper, iodine, manganese, selenium. Vitamins: Vitamins (A, B1, B2, B3, B5, B6, B12, C, D3, E, K1), folic acid, biotin. Aptamil Gold+ Reflux Infant Formula is based on cows' milk protein.
long_description:
Aptamil Gold+ Reflux is a specialty infant formula for regurgitation or mild reflux. Babies often spit up small amounts of milk after feeding (commonly known as reflux or regurgitation). However, some babies may suffer from more frequent regurgitation. Aptamil Gold+ Reflux has been specially tailored to help reduce the severity and frequency of regurgitation episodes.

  • This formula is thickened with carob bean gum, helping the formula to stay in the stomach, which may help reduce the severity and frequency of regurgitation episodes. This is a key element for the dietary management of regurgitation or mild reflux.
  • Contains scientifically researched ingredients
  • Nutritionally complete for infants aged 0 to 6 months, or suitable for infants aged 6 to 12 months as part of a mixed diet
  • 900g tin format


Aptamil Gold+ Reflux Infant Formula is not suitable for general use and should be used under medical supervision.
Not to be used for infants with a diagnosed cows' milk protein allergy.

long_description:
At Sanulac Nutritionals Australia, we believe balanced nutrition is important for growth & development and we are committed to bringing you the latest nutritional science for your baby.

From time to time, formula-fed babies have special dietary needs or conditions diagnosed by a healthcare professional where general formula may not be suitable. Alula Gold specialty formulas provide advanced nutrition for the dietary management of formula-fed infant feeding problems.

Alula Gold Lactose Intolerance Infant Formula is a premium, nutritionally complete, specially infant formula for babies from birth who are lactose intolerant or unable to properly digest lactose.
It continues to support your baby through the time when solids are being introduced at around 6 months, as a well-balanced diet is important.

ingredients: Whey protein hydrolysate (milk), vegetable oils (antioxidant (mixed tocopherols, ascorbyl palmitate)), glucose syrup, starch, short chain galacto-oligosaccharides (milk), maltodextrin, lactose (milk), long chain fructo-oligosaccharides, omega LCPUFAs (fish oil, antioxidant (mixed tocopherols, ascorbyl palmitate)), L-tyrosine, choline chloride, taurine, inositol, antioxidant (ascorbyl palmitate), L-carnitine, emulsifier (soy lecithin). Minerals: Potassium, calcium,chloride, phosphorus, sodium, iron, zinc, copper, iodine, manganese, selenium. Vitamins: Vitamins (A, B1, B2, B1, Bs, Be, B, C, D, E, K), folic acid, biotin. Nucleotides: Cytidine-5'-monophosphate, uridine-5'-monophosphate, adenosine-5'-monophosphate, inosine-5'-monophosphate, guanosine-5'-monophosphate.
long_description:
Aptamil Gold+ Colic & Constipation is a premium specialty infant formula suitable for infants experiencing colic and/or constipation. Specially researched and developed, it contains ingredients to help ease symptoms, reduce episodes of colic, and encourage softer and more frequent stools.
  • This formula is gently broken down (partially hydrolysed) and contains ingredients specially designed for the dietary management of colic and constipation
  • Supports the reduction of colic episodes, and promotes softer, more regular stools to help manage symptoms of constipation
  • Nutritionally complete for infants aged 0 to 6 months, or suitable for infants aged 6 to 12 months as part of a mixed diet
  • 900g tin format
Aptamil Gold+ Colic & Constipation is not suitable for general use and should be used under medical supervision. 
Not suitable for infants with confirmed cows' milk protein allergy, galactosaemia, lactose intolerance.
name: Gold+ Colic & Constipation Baby Infant Formula From Birth To 12 Months

description: NESTLE NAN EXPERTPRO REFLUX FORMULA FOR REGURGITATION FROM 0 TO 12 MONTHS 800G
ingredients: Enzymatically hydrolysed whey protein (cows' milk), potato starch, vegetable oils, lactose (milk), minerals (calcium phosphate, magnesium chloride, potassium chloride, sodium chloride, ferrous sulphate, zinc sulphate, copper sulphate, calcium carbonate, potassium iodide, manganese sulphate, sodium selenate), maltodextrin, L-phenylalanine, acidity regulator (citric acid), vitamins [sodium ascorbate (vit C), niacinamide (niacin), dl-alpha tocopheryl acetate (vit E), calcium pantothenate (pantothenic acid), retinyl acetate (vit A), thiamin mononitrate (vit B1), pyridoxine hydrochloride (vit B6), folic acid, cholecalciferol (vit D3), phylloquinone (vit K1), cyanocobalamin (vit B12), biotin], taurine, L-carnitine, Lactobacillus reuteri culture (DSM 17938 under license from BioGaia AB), inositol.
long_description:
NAN EXPERTpro Reflux Formula is a specialised infant formula suitable from 0 to 12 months and designed for the dietary management of mild reflux and regurgitation. To help manage regurgitation, NAN EXPERTpro Reflux formula is thickened with a plant-based starch. Combining the thickening properties of the plant-based starch with the probiotic L. reuteri, NAN EXPERTpro Reflux infant formula aims to assist with the dietary management of mild reflux and regurgitation. This baby formula from 0-12 months is backed by over 155 years of infant nutrition expertise helping nurture generations of formula fed infants. For hygiene and convenience, NAN EXPERT Reflux baby formula from 0 to 12 months is available in an innovative packaging format with a separate storage area for the scoop, and a semi-transparent window that allows you to see how much reflux formula there is left in the can without having to open it. NAN EXPERTpro Reflux formula is not suitable for general use and should be used under medical supervision. Contraindications: Not intended for use in case of declared or suspected cow's milk protein allergy. Not intended for parenteral use.
  • Reflux baby formula from 0-12 months which supports regurgitation management.

  • NAN EXPERTpro Reflux Infant formula is designed to support the dietary management of mild reflux and regurgitation.

  • This reflux baby formula is specifically designed for formula-fed babies from birth with mild reflux and regurgitation. Babies over 6 months of age will need additional nourishment.

  • Infant reflux formula comes in an innovative and convenient packaging format which includes a separate storage area for the scoop, making it easy to use.

  • NAN EXPERTpro Reflux baby formula is suitable from birth.
name: Nan Expertpro Reflux Formula For Regurgitation From 0 To 12 Months

ingredients: Maltodextrin, whey protein hydrolysate (contains milk), vegetable oils (antioxidant (ascorbyl palmitate, citric acid)), galacto-oligosaccharides (contains milk), omega LCPUFAs (contains fish, antioxidant (mixed tocopherols, ascorbyl palmitate)), emulsifier (citric acid ester of mono- and diglycerides, sunflower lecithin), long chain fructo-oligosaccharides, choline chloride, L-tyrosine, inositol, taurine, Bifidobacterium breve M-16V, L-carnitine. long_description:
Aptamil AllerPro SYNEO 1 is a nutritionally complete, premium infant formula suitable for formula fed infants (from birth to 6 months) who are allergic to cows' milk.

  • The protein in Aptamil AllerPro SYNEO has been broken down (extensively hydrolysed) for the dietary management of allergy symptoms.
  • Containing SYNEO, our patented blend of scientifically researched ingredients, Aptamil AllerPro Syneo is our most advanced formulation for the dietary management of cows' milk allergy.
  • Helps lay the foundations for your baby's future progress.


Aptamil AllerPro SYNEO infant formula is not suitable for general use and should be used under medical supervision.

*Not suitable for infants with anaphylactic (severe) cows' milk allergy.
name: Allerpro Syneo Baby Formula Stage 1

description: KARICARE FORMULA SOYA ALL AGES

long_description:
Karicare Soy Formula is based on soy proteins, and suitable from birth for infants where an alternative to cows' milk formula is required. Soy formula may be recommended by a healthcare professional for the dietary management of cows' milk allergy, usually only for babies over 6 months old, according to allergy guidelines.

At Karicare, we're committed to supporting sustainability. That's why this tin, including the lid and scoop, is recyclable. 

  • Made with non-GMO soy proteins
  • No added preservatives
  • No artificial flavours
  • Dairy-free, plant-based formula
  • Recyclable tin, lid and scoop

long_description:
Over 50 years of history in Australia

At Sanulac Nutritionals Australia, we believe nutrition, science and care are important for early life. Our Alula specialised range is here to support your little one's special dietary needs. Combining high quality, scientifically researched ingredients and care for your child.

Alula Allergy has been specially formulated to support formula-fed babies with cows' milk protein allergy or who are unable to tolerate cows' milk. It is suitable for babies who need to avoid dairy products and does not contain fish, sesame, soy or nut ingredients.

  • Specialised formula for infants with diagnosed cows' milk allergy

  • Suitable for lactose intolerance

  • Rice protein based infant formula

Alula Allergy is not suitable for general use and should be used under medical supervision.

  • Plant-based formulation

  • Suitable for lactose intolerance

  • 100% rice protein source

  • 100% Vegan

long_description:
Aptamil Gold+ Lactose Intolerance is a premium specialty infant formula. Lactose intolerance occurs when the body cannot properly digest lactose, a sugar naturally found in milk. This formula is suitable for babies who are recovering from diarrhoea associated with lactose intolerance, it may also assist with colic or digestive discomfort stemming from undigested lactose.

  • This formula is designed to help babies with digestive discomfort (e.g. wind, diarrhoea) as a result of undigested lactose or due to lactose intolerance. This is a key element for the dietary management of lactose intolerance
  • Contains scientifically researched ingredients
  • Nutritionally complete for infants aged 0 to 6 months, or suitable for infants aged 6 to 12 months as part of a mixed diet
  • 900g tin format


Aptamil Gold+ Lactose Intolerance Infant Formula is not suitable for general use and should be used under medical supervision. Consult your healthcare professional for advice.
Not suitable for babies with galactosaemia or with a diagnosed cows' milk allergy.
name: Gold+ Lactose Intolerance Baby Infant Formula From Birth To 12 Months

description: APTAMIL SENSITIVE TODDLER FROM 1 YEAR 900G
ingredients: Milk solids, vegetable oils (emulsifier (soy lecithin), antioxidant (ascorbyl palmitate)), short chain galacto-oligosaccharides (milk), dried omega LCPUFAs (fish oil), contains milk, sodium caseinate (milk), antioxidants (sodium ascorbate, mixed tocopherols, ascorbyl palmitate, dl-alpha tocopherol), whey protein (milk), emulsifier (soy lecithin)), long chain fructo-oligosaccharides, emulsifier trans <0.1g <0.1g (soy lecithin), Bifidobacterium breve M-16V. long_description:
Aptamil understands every feeding journey is unique. That's why we developed Aptamil Sensitive Toddler, a gentle formulation with a unique balance of partially hydrolysed whey protein for sensitive tummies, and no compromise on nutrition.

Suitable for toddlers aged 1+, Aptamil Sensitive Toddler is designed to help meet the dietary needs of toddlers. Backed by 50 years of early life nutrition research, this unique formulation is developed to support toddlers with a soft transition to consuming whole protein.

- Unique balance of partially hydrolysed whey protein
- Digestive Function: With calcium, which contributes to the function of digestive enzymes^
- Our unique prebiotic & probiotic blend
- Omega-3 DHA
- Immune system support^ with 8 immunity nutrients: Zinc, Iron, Folate,  Vitamins A, B6, B12, C, and D
- Cognitive function: Iron & Iodine for normal cognitive function^
- Normal growth & development with 16 essential vitamins and minerals^

^when prepared as directed and consumed as part of a healthy varied diet.

description: NESTLE NAN EXPERTPRO LACTOSE INTOLERENCE INFANT FORMULA 400G
ingredients: Glucose syrup, vegetable oils, milk solids, minerals (calcium citrate, potassium chloride, sodium phosphate, magnesium oxide, potassium citrate, ferrous sulphate, zinc sulphate, copper sulphate, manganese sulphate, potassium iodide, sodium selenate), emulsifier (soy lecithin), omega LCPUFAs (DHA from fish oil, AA), vitamins [sodium ascorbate (vit C), calcium pantothenate (vit B5), niacinamide (niacin), dl-alpha-tocopheryl acetate (vit E), retinyl acetate (vit A), thiamin mononitrate (vit B1), riboflavin (vit B2), pyridoxine hydrochloride (vit B6), folic acid, phylloquinone (vit K1), biotin, cholecalciferol (vit D3), cyanocobalamine (vit B12)], choline bitartrate, inositol, Lactobacillus reuteri culture (DSM 17938 under license from BioGaia AB), acidity regulator (citric acid), taurine, nucleotides (cytidine 5'-monophosphate, uridine 5'-monophosphate, adenosine 5'-monophosphate, guanosine 5'-monophosphate), L-histidine, antioxidant (mixed tocopherols concentrate, ascorbyl palmitate), L-carnitine.
long_description:
NAN EXPERTpro Lactose Intolerance baby formula is a specialised infant formula designed for formula-fed babies from birth who are experiencing lactose intolerance symptoms such as wind and diarrhoea. NAN EXPERTpro Lactose Intolerance formula from 0-12 months is not suitable for general use and should be used under medical supervision. It is important to note that this product should not be used for infants with glucose-galactose malabsorption or galactosemia. Consult with your healthcare provider before using NAN EXPERTpro Lactose Intolerance baby formula from 0-12 months to ensure that it is the right choice for your baby's specific needs. Backed by over 155 years of infant nutrition expertise, Nestle has helped to nurture generations of formula fed infants. For hygiene and convenience, it is available in an innovative packaging format with a separate storage area for the scoop, and a semi-transparent window which allows you to see how much baby formula there is left in the can without having to open it.
  • Our baby formula for the dietary management of lactose intolerance.

  • Specialised infant formula designed to cater to the nutritional requirements of formula-fed infants with symptoms such as wind or diarrhoea associated with lactose intolerance.

  • Made to provide balanced nutrition for your little one.

  • Baby formula created to help with symptoms such as wind or diarrhoea associated with lactose intolerance.

  • NAN EXPERTpro Lactose Intolerance baby formula is suitable from birth.
name: Expertpro Formula Lactose Intolerence

- Made from Goat Milk
- Nutritionally complete
- Rich in essential vitamins and minerals
- Includes Omega 3 (DHA), Omega 6 (ARA), and our unique blend of prebiotics (including natural oligosaccharides) and probiotics.

- Gentle on tummies.

If you do not breastfeed, Oli6 provides an alternative and is suitable from birth. Before you decide to use Oli6, consult your healthcare professional for advice.It is recommended that children should be offered foods in addition to infant formula from 6 months.As at 12 months, Oli6 Stage 2 Follow On Formula, can be replaced by Oli6 Stage 3 Toddler Drink.

  • The natural prebiotics found in Oli6 naturally aid gut health and digestion.

  • Oli6 Stage 2 (6-12 months)

  • Oli6 is made from high quality goat milk that is naturally easier to digest.

  • Oli6 contains natural prebiotics oligosaccharides. There are up to six times the amount of natural prebiotic oligos in goats milk when compared to cows milk..

  • Contains Zinc and Vitamin C.

  • Zinc and Vitamin C to aid brain development and cognitive function.

description: TILDA KIDS VEGETABLE PAELLA RICE POUCH 125G
ingredients: Natural Long Grain Rice - Steamed (58%), Vegetables (22%) (Onions, Red Peppers, Peas, Sweet Potato), Passata (15%), Vegetable Oils (Rapeseed, Sunflower), Vegetable Stock Powder (Rice Flour, Salt, Onions, Parsnips, Carrots, Olive Oil, Turmeric, Parsley), Tomato Paste (0.7%), Smoked Paprika, Parsley, Turmeric.
long_description:
Tilda?? is a multicultural British brand that has been the go-to choice for rice aficionados for 50 years. Founded back in London in 1970, we introduced Pure Basmati to rice-loving communities from around the world, who were looking for aromatic Basmati that they couldn't find in the UK at the time. Today we are proud to sit at the heart of many dinner tables with our wide, delicious range including many Tilda?? dry rice varieties as well as Tilda?? Microwave Rice, and Tilda?? Kids. All Tilda products are made with carefully sourced, natural ingredients so they're all nutritionally balanced and packed with natural goodness. By removing broken and inferior grains we make sure that our rice cooks up perfectly.

Perfect for children who are weaned and happily eating solid food, our Tilda Kids range has been especially developed with younger palates in mind. Every pouch is bursting with yummy, natural ingredients with nothing artificial so whether it be our delicious range of rice and vegetables or our tasty rice puddings, you're in safe hands with us. All variants are gluten free and vegetarian. The perfect cupboard essential for busy parents.

Tilda Kids rice and vegetables has lots of hidden veggies meaning every pack counts as 1 of your child's 5-a-day! Delicious on their own or with chicken, fish, meatballs or more vegetables, they are ready in only 40 seconds in the microwave or just 3 minutes in a pan. Mealtimes really can be easy, tasty, and healthy too!
name: Kids Vegetable Paella Rice Pouch

long_description:
A delicious recipe prepared with pumpkin, potatoes, carrots, beef and polenta, Heinz for Baby Pumpkin Potato & Beef is designed for ages 6+ months. This pureed meal can also be added to home-cooked veggies for older babies who are ready for more textures. Heinz for Baby Pumpkin Potato & Beef contains no preservatives, as well as no added salt, artificial colours or flavours. It's easy to grab for on the go, and easy to serve cold with a spoon. If your little one prefers warmer meals, the pouch can also be warmed in a bowl of hot water.
  • No artificial colours or flavours

  • No added salt

  • Source of protein

  • For ages 6 months onwards

  • No preservatives
